label: === RESOLVE: Verify behavior values and mode 05 clearing ===
Using button 4 (index 03) which has mode 05 red override
=== Q1: Can we clear mode 05 override? ===
Btn 4 - confirm off-color is something visible (set mode 04 to green)
Btn 4 - set override to white (confirm override works)
--- Btn 4 should be WHITE now (override). Confirm, then ENTER ---
Btn 4 - try clearing override with mode 05 no-value (GET-style)
--- Btn 4: still white, or changed to green (mode 04)? ENTER ---
Btn 4 - re-override to white
Btn 4 - try setting mode 04 green AFTER override - does it break through?
--- Btn 4: still white, or green? ENTER ---
Btn 4 - re-override to white again
Btn 4 - try setting mode 03 blue AFTER override
--- Btn 4: still white, or blue? ENTER ---
=== Q2: Behavior value 01 — load_on or load_off? ===
Make sure entry light is ON before this test
Btn 4 - set behavior to value 01
--- LIGHT IS ON. Press Btn 4. Did light turn OFF or stay ON? ENTER ---
Turn light back on manually if needed, then ENTER
Btn 4 - set behavior to value 00 (disabled) to stop accidental toggles
=== Q3: Behavior value 03 — test with hold ===
Btn 4 - set behavior to value 03
--- TAP Btn 4. Then HOLD Btn 4 for 2s. Describe both. ENTER ---
Btn 4 - reset to disabled
